query: Help us think through this positioning shift: We want to pivot our product from a generic 'AI customer support chatbot' to a 'fully autonomous customer success agent for enterprise B2B SaaS.'
expected_behavior: Categorizes the initiative as a positioning/messaging move
Performs an assumptions audit rating validation risk on technical and customer expectations
Highlights critical blind spots in enterprise integrations, security constraints, or liability questions
Documents a contrarian anti-conventional play and an execution blueprint
Specifies leading metrics and a clear kill criteria threshold based on reply or meeting interest
